rationale: Perfect for warehouse environment where function and clarity are paramount. High contrast aids legibility for workers using mobile devices in varying lighting conditions.

primary.description: Safety Yellow / Warning Yellow. High visibility for primary CTAs. Text on this should be stark black.

secondary.description: International Klein Blue. For secondary actions, charts, and trust elements.

accent.description: Signal Red. For high severity feedback, errors, and alerts.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy with large touch targets for warehouse workers.

components.buttons: Large touch area (min-h-14). Solid fill for primary (Safety Yellow), outline for secondary. High contrast text (black text on yellow).
components.inputs: Large padding (p-4), clear borders (border-border), distinct focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-secondary/50).
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover: slight lift and shadow.
components.navigation: Sticky top nav for workers (mobile-first), collapsible sidebar for admin dashboard. Glassmorphism effect on scroll.
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Use high contrast colors (Blue, Yellow, Red) for clarity. Accessible patterns.

motion.form_interaction: micro-interactions on checkbox/radio selections for tactile feedback

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for standard text, 3:1 for large text. Black text on Safety Yellow background.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., submit-feedback-btn, category-select).

hero_image_login.description: A yellow forklift in a large warehouse. Use with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/70) for text legibility on login/landing page.

background_texture.description: Safety yellow textured surface. Can be used as a subtle accent background for critical alert cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the worker form mobile-first with extremely clear, large inputs. Do not clutter the screen.
Implement light and dark mode. Ensure Safety Yellow remains high contrast in both.
For the admin dashboard, utilize Shadcn tables, charts, and cards. Use a clean Swiss layout (Archetype 4) - data density but well aligned.
Ensure the feedback form supports Finnish (FI) and English (EN) toggle.
Add 'data-testid' to all form fields, buttons, and filters.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use the provided media URLs.
Follow 'Grid Borders' micro-theme for the dashboard cards to expose the structure.
